nodes.context: Colombian drug trafficking organization active in northern Colombia from 1980 to 1998.
Colombian drug cartel that assigned the Caribbean region as a territorial franchise to the Mono Abello.
Colombian drug cartel that assigned Caribbean routes to Orlández Gamboa after the fall of Medellín.

aliases: Bloque Norte de las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia
nodes.context: Paramilitary bloc that took over the Costa cartel's drug routes after its dissolution.
Colombian drug cartel that took over territory from the weakened Costa cartel.
Colombian drug cartel that was a partner of the Costa cartel's second-in-command.
Criminal clan that was a partner of Alberto Orlández Gamboa.
Criminal clan eliminated by Alberto Orlández Gamboa in a vendetta.
Criminal band allied with Orlández Gamboa that committed sicario crimes in Barranquilla.
Drug trafficking organization led by Libardo de Jesús Parra González, a lieutenant of Orlández Gamboa.
Colombian guerrilla group initially suspected of ordering the murder of Jairo Durán Fernández.
Criminal organization that allegedly ordered the murder of Gustavo Salazar Bernal over a lost drug shipment.

edges.evidence_quote: con la irrupción de poder del cartel de Medellín , Escobar asignó la región Caribe como franquicia territorial al "Mono" Abello.
edges.context: Cartel de Medellín assigned the Caribbean region as a territorial franchise to the Costa cartel's leader.

edges.evidence_quote: Al caer el cartel de Medellín, el cartel de Cali asignó las rutas del Caribe como franquicia territorial a Orlández Gamboa.
edges.context: Cartel de Cali assigned Caribbean routes as a territorial franchise to the Costa cartel's leader.

edges.evidence_quote: El Bloque Norte de las AUC se apropió de las rutas del narcotráfico del cartel de la Costa
edges.context: Bloque Norte de las AUC took over the Costa cartel's drug routes after its dissolution.

edges.evidence_quote: su territorio empezó a ser copado por otros agentes ilegales, y narcotraficantes en su mayoría ligados al cartel del Norte del Valle
edges.context: Cartel del Norte del Valle took over territory from the weakened Costa cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: Salomón Camacho Mora alias "Papa Grande": Segundo al mando del Cartel de la Costa y socio del Cartel de La Guajira
edges.context: The Costa cartel's second-in-command was a partner of the Guajira cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: Fue socio del clan Nasser Arana junto con Roger Pombo Ortega, Germán Libonatty Pimienta alias "Pedro", Jattin Arnulfo Pinto Vásquez y Julio César Anicchiarico.
edges.context: Alberto Orlández Gamboa, leader of the Costa cartel, was a partner of the Nasser Arana clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Orlández Gamboa eliminó al Clan Valdeblanquez en una vendetta.
edges.context: The Costa cartel's leader eliminated the Valdeblanquez clan in a vendetta.

edges.evidence_quote: Gamboa y su lugarteniente en el cartel Wildron Gabriel Daza Mejía, alias "Gabi Daza" (asesinado en 2011 ), realizaron alianza con expolicías para potenciar bandas criminales como "Los Alcatraces"
edges.context: The Costa cartel allied with former police to strengthen Los Alcatraces.

edges.evidence_quote: Libardo de Jesús Parra González , alias "El Flaco" o "El Guajiro": Lugarteniente de Orlández Gamboa, también lideró el "Cartel de la Tierra".
edges.context: A lieutenant of the Costa cartel also led the Tierra cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: la primera, que había sido ajusticiado por órdenes de la guerrilla de las FARC
edges.context: The FARC was initially suspected of ordering the murder of a Costa cartel member, but later ruled out.

edges.evidence_quote: Gustavo Salazar Bernal : Fue asesinado en su natal Cartagena el 30 de agosto de 2001 por el sicario Jhon Freddy Orrego Marín, presumiblemente porque "perdió" un embarque de drogas propiedad de Los Mellizos enviado a Europa
edges.context: A former collaborator of the Costa cartel was killed over a lost drug shipment belonging to Los Mellizos.

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Cartel del Norte del Valle , Cartel de Cali (Hasta su desarticulación)
edges.context: The infobox lists Cartel de Cali as an enemy until its dismantlement.

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Cartel del Norte del Valle , Cartel de Cali (Hasta su desarticulación)
edges.context: The infobox lists Cartel del Norte del Valle as an enemy.
